title: Malaysian Sea Bass Satay
description: A delicious and flavorful seafood dish inspired by Malaysian cuisine, featuring moist sea bass skewers grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: Rich and creamy base for satay sauce

ingredients.name: Peanut Oil
ingredients.notes: Healthy and flavorful oil for grilling

ingredients.name: Fish Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak skewers in water for 30 minutes before use

ingredients.name: Kebab Spices
ingredients.notes: Add flavor to your satay with these aromatic spices

ingredients.name: Lime Wedges
ingredients.notes: Serve with satay for a burst of citrus flavor

ingredients.name: Chopped Fresh Cilantro
ingredients.notes: Garnish with fresh herbs for added freshness

ingredients.name: Grated Ginger
ingredients.notes: Add warmth and depth to your satay sauce

instructions: 1. Soak fish skewers in water for 30 minutes.
3. Cut sea bass into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers.
4. In a bowl, mix together coconut milk, peanut oil, satay sauce mix, kebab spices, and grated ginger.
5. Brush the mixture onto the sea bass skewers.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and slightly charred.
7. Serve with lime wedges and garnish with chopped cilantro.
8. Enjoy your delicious Malaysian Sea Bass Satay!
